name: Mala Sauce Cookie
description:
my favorite little rabid cookie /silly

i wonder if she's ever tried sweet foods

Mala Sauce Cookie is a short Cookie with moderately dark, red-undertoned dough. She has crimson hair that is cut bluntly and tied into low pigtails, resembling sausages. She has burning red eyes and a scar on her lip. She wears a horned helmet, a frayed brown pelt worn as a shirt, and a downy burgundy vest resembling furs. The accessories she wears includes two black bracelets tied around each of her wrists.

MALA SAUCE COOKIE IS A GOVERNMENT OFFICIAL THIS IS WILD
creator: Latwre
